title: Shears Disables Tripwires/String Again
description: This mod allows you to duplicate string by disabling tripwires with shears again. Forge has disabled this by default, and this mod restores the functionality.
body:
**Shears Disable Tripwires Again**

[Forge](https://files.minecraftforge.net/net/minecraftforge/forge/) 1.19.2/1.20.1/1.21

**⚠** **Important**: Make sure you are facing south when building, as I (The author) has observed that it only seems to work in this direction.

Tired of Forge disabling the classic tripwire trick? This mod restores the ability to break tripwires with shears without triggering them, just like before. Now you can once again duplicate string effortlessly!

🔹 **Features**:
✔ Re-enables shears disabling tripwires
✔ Works exactly as it did before Forge removed it
✔ Simple, lightweight, and effective

💡 **Perfect for farms, redstone contraptions, or just getting extra string!**
